title: asplenium × confluens
intro: Asplenium × confluens, also known as the hybrid spleenwort, is a rare and unique plant species resulting from the natural hybridization of Asplenium septentrionale and Asplenium trichomanes. This fern has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Asplenium × confluens include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be dried and used in smudges or incense for its purifying properties.
